name: Chocolate Velvet Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafer crumbs, chopped pecans, granulated sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
3. In another bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add the brown sugar, mixing well.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Stir in the melted semi-sweet chocolate chips and almond-flavored liqueur.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 325 degrees F. for 35 minutes.
7. Increase the oven temperature to 425 degrees F. Mix together the sour cream and granulated sugar.
8. Carefully spread the mixture over the cheesecake.
9. Bake at 425 degrees F. for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Remove the cake from the pan and cool before serving.
VARIATION:
Substitute 2 tablespoons of milk and 1/4 teaspoon of almond extract for the almond-flavored liqueur.
